question: What structural feature distinguishes O-mannosylation from O-GalNAc glycosylation?
options: O-mannose links directly to Ser/Thr, O-GalNAc uses GalNAc
explanation: O-mannosylation adds mannose directly to serine/threonine, while mucin-type O-glycosylation adds GalNAc. O-mannosylation is particularly important in brain glycoproteins.
